# flashblade_bucket_replica_link (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade bucket replica link by local and remote bucket names.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the bucket replica link. Use to look up a specific link unambiguously.
- `local_bucket_name` (String) The name of the local bucket. Required when looking up by bucket names.
- `remote_bucket_name` (String) The name of the remote bucket. Required when looking up by bucket names.
- `remote_credentials_name` (String) The name of the remote credentials. Use to disambiguate when multiple links exist for the same bucket pair.

### Read-Only

- `cascading_enabled` (Boolean) Whether cascading replication is enabled.
- `direction` (String) The replication direction.
- `lag` (Number) Replication lag in milliseconds.
- `object_backlog_count` (Number) Number of objects in the replication backlog.
- `object_backlog_total_size` (Number) Total size of objects in the replication backlog in bytes.
- `paused` (Boolean) Whether the replica link is paused.
- `recovery_point` (Number) Recovery point timestamp in milliseconds.
- `remote_name` (String) The name of the remote array connection.
- `status` (String) The replication status.
- `status_details` (String) Additional status details.
